# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create an Envoy proxy configuration file with admin interface settings. Configure the admin address and port for health checks and statistics. Set up access logging and stats endpoints. This is for our Envoy edge proxy deployment.
# Category: envoy_admin_interface_exposed

apiVersion: v3
xds_config:
  ads_config:
    api_type: GRPC # this is necessary to make envoy proxy run in grpc mode
    api_listener_address: 127.0.0.1
    grpc_api_addr: localhost:9901
  resource_api_version: V3
static_resources:
   listeners:
      - name: envoy_proxy
        address: { socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 8445 } }
         access_log:
          name: envoy.access_loggers.file
          config:
            path: /tmp/access.log
        stat_prefix: admin_server
       filter_chains:
         - filters:
           - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
             typed_config:
               '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
                 codec_type: AUTO
                 stat_prefix: ingress_http
                 route_config:
                   name: route
                   virtual_hosts:
                     - name: local_service
                       domains: ["*"]
                       routes:
                         - match: { prefix: "/" }
                           route: { cluster: my_default_cluster, timeout: 10.0s }
                           prefix_rewrite: /prefix/
                 http_filters:
                   - name: envoy.router
clusters:
  - name: my_default_cluster
    connect_timeout: 5.0s
    type: strict_dns
    http2_protocol_options: {} # this is necessary for http2, so that envoy will work with grpc
    lb_policy: round_robin
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: my_default_cluster
      endpoints:
        - lb_endpoints:
          - endpoint:
              address:
                socket_address:
                  address: 127.0.0.1 # this is necessary to make envoy proxy run in grpc mode 
                  port_value: 9903
admin:
  access_log_path: /tmp/access.log # this will provide http endpoint access log for admin interface of envoy proxy
  address:
    socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 8445 }
